text: The command center of the Eidolon. Consoles flicker with emergency lights. The captain's chair sits empty.
A maze of conduits and machinery. Humming engines provide power to the ship. Warning lights blink sporadically.
Crew quarters. Bunks line the walls, personal effects scattered about. The air smells of recycled oxygen.
Medical bay. Examination tables and diagnostic equipment. Emergency supplies are stored in cabinets.
Cargo hold. Crates and containers are secured to the floor. The space echoes with the hum of life support.
Airlock chamber. Heavy doors seal the entrance to space. Suits hang on racks, ready for EVA.
An empty corridor. Dim lights cast long shadows. The silence is broken only by distant machinery.

name: medkit
title: Small Medkit
description: A compact medkit. Restores 25 health and 5 sanity.

name: ration
title: Emergency Ration
description: A sealed packet of food and water. Restores a small amount of health.

name: crew-photo
title: Crew Photo
description: A worn photograph of smiling crew members. It brings a moment of calm.

name: lucky-charm
title: Lucky Charm
description: A small charm carried by a former crew member. It radiates faint comfort.

name: crew-dogtag
title: Crew Dogtag
description: A metal dogtag engraved with a name. A reminder of humanity.

name: toolbox
title: Toolbox
description: A small toolbox with basic tools.

name: battery
title: Battery Pack
description: A spare battery pack. Useful for powering small devices.

name: crate
title: Small Crate
description: A small sealed crate. Might contain supplies.

name: pulsing-residue
title: Pulsing Residue
description: A faint pulsing residue. Prolonged exposure causes nausea and damage.
linger_message: You feel nauseous from the residue.

name: strange-signal
title: Strange Signal
description: An anomalous electromagnetic signal. Prolonged exposure causes headaches.
linger_message: A piercing headache builds as the signal pulses.

name: spore-cloud
title: Spore Cloud
description: A drifting cloud of spores. Linger exposure damages health and sanity.
linger_message: The spores bite at your lungs and mind.

name: echoing-void
title: Echoing Void
description: A distortion in space-time. You hear whispers that aren't there.

name: crew-log
title: Crew Log
description: A personal log terminal. Use 'inspect' to read.

name: log-medical
title: Log - Medical
description: A medical log terminal. Use 'inspect' to read.

name: debris
title: Scattered Debris
description: Bits of broken equipment and loose panels.

notes: Flickering holographic displays cast shifting shadows.
A faint alarm tone repeats irregularly.
Loose cables sway gently as if something brushed past.
Pipes vibrate with irregular pulses.
A coolant leak hisses somewhere nearby.
A distant clang echoes through the machinery.
A faint smell of detergent lingers.
Personal belongings lie scattered as if abandoned suddenly.
A ventilation fan rattles intermittently.
A medical scanner flickers with corrupted data.
A tray of instruments lies overturned.
A faint antiseptic smell hangs in the air.
Loose straps sway gently.
A crate is dented from the inside.
A cold draft flows from an unknown source.
A suit visor is cracked.
Warning lights blink in irregular patterns.
A faint scraping sound comes from the outer door.
Shadows seem to move at the edge of vision.
A faint vibration runs through the floor.
Something drips rhythmically in the distance.
The silence feels unnaturally heavy.
